category_sources: Official Translate Toolkit docs describe user and developer documentation for localization tools.
source_facts.description says it is a toolkit for localization engineers.
docs_sources: Official documentation is hosted on docs.translatehouse.org for Translate Toolkit.
source_facts.homepage points to the official toolkit.translatehouse.org project site.
repo_sources: Official GitHub README identifies the Translate Toolkit as part of the Translate project.
tags_sources: Official docs and README describe converters, tools, scripts, PO/XLIFF handling, and Python APIs.
